posture: 9 roles · 1 strong-act · 1 verifiable public interim/contract (recruiter-held Financial Controller) worth fast action
summary: Afternoon refresh: the morning's public-sector governance/risk and board surfaces are carried forward, and a browser pass of the §1a specialist recruiters surfaced a genuinely live, publicly-verifiable contract role — a hands-on Financial Controller (contract, Sydney CBD, immediate start) on the Sharp & Carter contract desk, plus a Sydney contract Finance Manager. The Robert Half 6-month Financial Controller seen earlier has expired (the posting now redirects to an invalid-job search). Board/NED supply is steady (NSW audit-and-risk-committee panel, Board Direction, AICD teasers). Standing reminder: most recruiter interim desks (Bluefin, Kaizen, Robert Half, Sharp & Carter) advertise little publicly, so being registered and CV-current with them remains the highest-leverage move; this run was browser-verified via Chrome.

items.headline: Independent Chairs & Members, Audit & Risk Committees — NSW Government (Sydney, prequalification panel)
items.summary: Standing NSW Government scheme (ProcurePoint SCM2421) that prequalifies independent chairs and members for the audit and risk committees of NSW departments and statutory bodies. Appointees serve on committees overseeing internal audit, risk management and internal controls.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FAICD + audit/risk/governance profile and existing committee experience; getting on the panel positions you for multiple NSW committee appointments. Apply to join the register rather than to a single dated vacancy.

items.headline: Non-Executive Director vacancies across AU sectors — Board Direction listing platform
items.summary: Board Direction refreshes Australia's largest public NED listing roughly fortnightly; the latest batch (published through ~26 June) spans Education, Financial & Insurance Services, Health, Environment, NFP, Welfare and government across the states, with closing dates through July–August.
items.so_what: Worth a scan for interstate board seats (monthly-travel cadence acceptable per your rule); filter for FS/insurance/energy/government affinity. No single Sydney role isolated today — browse the live list.

items.headline: Directorship Opportunities — ~80 live board roles nationally (AICD, member-gated)
items.summary: AICD's Directorship Opportunities platform currently features 80+ board vacancies and adds ~15 new positions a week from up to 4,800 registered organisations. Only public teasers are visible without a member subscription (~$85–88/yr).
items.so_what: As an FAICD this is your richest board pipeline; teasers only here. Worth a manual look in DO this week to filter by sector/location and apply directly — log in on your own account.

items.headline: Executive Director, Finance & Strategy (CFO) — NSW Reconstruction Authority (Sydney)
items.summary: Senior NSW Government CFO-level role providing strategic leadership of financial and performance management for the Reconstruction Authority. A published role description was located; its current advertising/open status could not be confirmed in this run.
items.so_what: Strong level/sector fit (public-sector C-suite finance, Sydney) to your CFO/COO targets. Verify it is currently open before acting — treat as a lead to confirm on I Work for NSW / the agency site.

items.headline: Financial Controller (Contract) — international scale-up, Sydney CBD (Sharp & Carter)
items.summary: Live contract role on Sharp & Carter's finance contract desk: a hands-on, year-end-focused Financial Controller for a growing Australian scale-up with overseas subsidiaries, owning statutory reporting and leading a complex external audit while managing a small team. Sydney CBD, hybrid, daily rate, immediate start; CA or CPA required.
items.so_what: Direct fit to your FCPA + financial-control background and a §1a specialist-recruiter contract role where speed matters — contact Sharp & Carter and apply today while you're immediately available. Browser-verified live this afternoon.

items.headline: Finance Manager (Contract, immediate start) — IT organisation, Sydney (Sharp & Carter)
items.summary: Sydney-based hands-on Finance Manager on the Sharp & Carter contract desk with a recognisable IT organisation, supporting management and reporting of the company's finances; immediate/short-notice start.
items.so_what: On-target function and Sydney location, and a genuine contract engagement; as a plain Manager-level role it is in-scope but capped at watch per the seniority rule. Quick to action if you want a near-term contract bridge.

items.headline: Manager, Governance — NSW Government (Sydney City)
items.summary: Public-sector management role leading governance, internal audit, risk and compliance initiatives within a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: On-target function and Sydney location; as a plain Manager-level role it is in-scope but lower priority (capped at watch). Solid governance/risk fit if open to a public-sector management seat.

items.headline: Manager, Cyber Security Governance, Risk & Compliance — NSW Government (Sydney City)
items.summary: Manager-level GRC role spanning cyber security governance, risk and compliance for a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: Blends your risk/compliance and IT-leadership affinity; Sydney-based. Manager level so capped at watch — relevant if the security-GRC angle appeals.

items.headline: Senior Governance Officer — Corporate Governance, Audit & Risk, NSW Government (Sydney)
items.summary: Officer-level role supporting corporate governance, audit and risk/compliance functions within a NSW Government entity.
items.so_what: Below your target level (officer, not manager), so awareness only — useful as a read on where NSW governance teams are hiring rather than a role to chase.
